title: Daily Source Digest
note: Daily source-balanced news digest — morning update.

stories.title: Trump promises U.S. help for Lebanon during a White House meeting with its president
stories.summary:
Trump promises U.S. help for Lebanon during a White House meeting with its president. President Donald Trump pledged to help Lebanon "a lot" during a White House meeting on Tuesday with the country's leader, Joseph Aoun, who came to push for long-term calm after months of war between Israel and the Iran-backed Hezbollah militant group.

Al Jazeera: Lebanon’s goal to end hostilities with Israel ‘forever’, says president. Al Jazeera reports that lebanese President Aoun told Trump that Lebanon's “ultimate objective” is to end hostilities with Israel “forever”.

links.headline: Lebanon’s goal to end hostilities with Israel ‘forever’, says president
links.excerpt: Lebanese President Aoun told Trump that Lebanon's “ultimate objective” is to end hostilities with Israel “forever”.
links.imageAlt: Lebanon’s goal to end hostilities with Israel ‘forever’, says president

links.excerpt: President Trump greeted Lebanese President Joseph Aoun at the White House on Tuesday and shared optimism about Israel's planned withdrawal from south Lebanon and efforts to disarm Iran-backed Hezbollah terrorists.

stories.title: Iran-Backed Houthi Terrorists Announce ‘Maritime Blockade’ of Saudi Arabia
stories.summary:
Iran-Backed Houthi Terrorists Announce ‘Maritime Blockade’ of Saudi Arabia. The Iran-backed Houthi insurgents of Yemen on Monday declared a “maritime ban” against Saudi Arabia, implicitly a threat to attack Saudi oil tankers passing through the Red Sea on their way to the Suez Canal.

The post Iran-Backed Houthi Terrorists Announce ‘Maritime Blockade’ of Saudi Arabia appeared first on <a rel="nofollow" href="htt. BBC: Yemen's Houthis announce 'maritime embargo' on Saudi Arabia.

BBC reports that the Houthis say the embargo begins immediately and is a response to a Saudi blockade of ports and airports in Yemen.

stories.title: British leader Burnham gathers his Cabinet after sweeping away Starmer supporters
stories.summary:
British leader Burnham gathers his Cabinet after sweeping away Starmer supporters. New U.K. Prime Minister Andy Burnham gathered his Cabinet for its first meeting on Tuesday and vowed to take a "one-team approach" despite purging allies of predecessor Keir Starmer from the government.

Al Jazeera: UK PM Burnham: ‘We need to be a cost-of-living government’.

Al Jazeera reports that at his first cabinet meeting as UK prime minister, Burnham told ministers they must be a "cost-of-living government".

stories.title: Journey Star Slams Bruce Springsteen As ‘Bitter Old Man’ Over Anti-Trump Rants
stories.summary:
Journey Star Slams Bruce Springsteen As ‘Bitter Old Man’ Over Anti-Trump Rants. Longtime Journey band member Jonathan Cain shared some strong criticisms about far-Left activist Bruce Springsteen, basically telling him to stop talking politics and perform.

“Guys like Bruce Springsteen should shut up, you know,” the keyboardist told The Complete Disaster Network podcast.

“Honestly, shut up, Bruce.” Cain, who is conservative, did the interview back in May ... Breitbart: Journey's Jonathan Cain Slams Bruce Springsteen as an 'Annoying, Bitter Old Man' Who Should 'Shut Up' About Politics.

Breitbart reports that jonathan Cain, a keyboardist and guitarist for the rock band Journey, slammed left-wing rocker Bruce Springsteen as an "annoying, bitter old man" who should "shut up" about politics.

"You were 'Born in the USA,' weren't you?" Cain said of Springsteen, adding, "So act like it." The p

stories.title: Sherrill to remove 6,000 noncitizens from voter rolls after DMV error
stories.summary:
Sherrill to remove 6,000 noncitizens from voter rolls after DMV error. Gov. Mikie Sherrill (D-NJ) announced on Tuesday that her administration removed about 6,600 residents who identified as noncitizens from New Jersey’s voter rolls after the non-citizen residents were added due to a software error.

“Last week I learned that a serious software error in New Jersey’s Motor Vehicle System led to the registration of roughly […]. Daily Wire: New Jersey Registered Thousands Of Non-Citizens To Vote Due To ‘Software Error’.

Daily Wire reports that thousands of non-citizens were registered to vote in New Jersey in what officials are classifying as a “software error.” Democratic New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill revealed Tuesday that she was made aware of the apparent mistake last week.

She claimed that the state’s Motor Vehicle Commission (MVC) registered roughly 6,600 non-citizens who indica

stories.title: Suspect In NYC Explosion Outside ICE Office ID’d As Anti-ICE ‘Extremist’
stories.summary:
Suspect In NYC Explosion Outside ICE Office ID’d As Anti-ICE ‘Extremist’. The suspect accused of detonating an incendiary device outside New York City’s federal immigration office has been identified by multiple news outlets as 43-year-old military veteran Andrew Arrabaca, who was said to be carrying a sign reading “ICE off our streets” during Monday’s attack.

Authorities said Arrabaca poured “what is believed to be gasoline” on ... Breitbart: Alleged 26 Federal Plaza Attacker ID'ed as Andrew Arrabaca.

Breitbart reports that the alleged 26 Federal Plaza attacker has been identified as Andrew Arrabaca, according to law enforcement sources cited in a report. The post Alleged 26 Federal Plaza Attacker ID’ed as Andrew Arrabaca appeared first on Breitbart .

stories.title: The Odyssey was filmed on Imax film. Only one southern hemisphere cinema can screen it – video
stories.summary:
The Odyssey was filmed on Imax film. Only one southern hemisphere cinema can screen it – video.

Christopher Nolan's latest film, an adaptation of Homer's epic The Odyssey, is the the first feature film ever shot entirely on Imax 1570 film, the highest-resolution film format in existence. There are now only 41 cinemas in the world capable of projecting the format.

Guardian Australia goes behind the scenes at Imax Melbourne, the only cinema in the southern hemisphere with a 1570 reel of Nolan's film <a href="https://www.theguardian.com/film/2026/jul/14/christopher-nolan-fans.

stories.summary:

YouTube has also reached a deal, leaving Meta as the only remaining defendant.

stories.title: Apple teams up with Klarna to launch a lease-to-own program for iPhones, iPads, and Macs
stories.summary:
Apple teams up with Klarna to launch a lease-to-own program for iPhones, iPads, and Macs. The new leasing program is a big change for the hardware company, and comes as it looks to raise prices on many of its products.

The Verge: Apple’s rumored ‘Upgrade’ program brings lease-to-own pricing for iPhones, Macs, and iPads.

The Verge reports that as component and RAM shortages drive prices higher, Apple is reportedly launching an "Apple Upgrade" program for leasing.

stories.title: How AI may drive union-resistant tech workers to the bargaining table
stories.summary:
How AI may drive union-resistant tech workers to the bargaining table.

Tech workers are increasingly unionizing, trading Silicon Valley’s myth of exceptionalism for collective bargaining to contest the corporate deployment of artificial intelligence For decades, the technology industry was a fortress that labor unions couldn’t breach.

Tech workers already had cushy compensation packages, dream benefits like unlimited vacation and free lunch, and a flat corporate hierarchy that made engineers feel as powerful as their bosses, all of whom dressed down in sne.

stories.summary:

stories.title: No Matibag – Cayetano fireworks on Day 8 of Sara Duterte impeach trial
stories.summary:
No Matibag – Cayetano fireworks on Day 8 of Sara Duterte impeach trial. MANILA, Philippines — Despite their verbal spat last week, there was no confrontation on Tuesday between National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) Director Melvin Matibag and siblings Senate Minority Leader Alan Peter Cayetano and Senator Pia Cayetano.

stories.title: No jackpot winner in 6/58, 6/49, 6/42 draws on Tuesday, July 21
stories.summary:
No jackpot winner in 6/58, 6/49, 6/42 draws on Tuesday, July 21. MANILA, Philippines—No bettor won the jackpot prizes for the Ultra Lotto 6/58, SuperLotto 6/49 and Lotto 6/42 draws on Tuesday, July 21, according to the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO).

Ultra Lotto 6/58 result: 47-49-17-31-28-30.

Jackpot prize: ₱148.19 million SuperLotto 6/49 result: 48-15-37-44-08-42 Jackpot prize: ₱82.28 million Lotto 6/42 result: 17-41-13-10-38-16. Jackpot prize: ₱10 million.

stories.title: 140 hawksbill hatchlings released in Zamboanga Sibugay
stories.summary:
140 hawksbill hatchlings released in Zamboanga Sibugay.

PAGADIAN CITY, Zamboanga del Sur – Some 140 critically endangered Hawksbill sea turtle hatchlings (Eretmochelys imbricata) were released at Pandilusan Island, Payao, Zamboanga Sibugay on Sunday, July 19, marking another milestone in marine biodiversity conservation, the Department of Environment and Natural Resources – Region 9 (DENR-9) said.

Marie Angelique Go, DENR-9 regional executive director, said.

stories.title: Marcoleta arraignment for ‘gift’ rap set July 22
stories.summary:
Marcoleta arraignment for ‘gift’ rap set July 22.

MANILA, Philippines — The arraignment and pretrial of Sen. Rodante Marcoleta and his co-accused, Joseph Espiritu for violation of a presidential decree that prohibits government officials from receiving, and private individuals from conferring gifts were set by the Sandiganbayan Third Division on Wednesday, July 22.

The Third Division published the arraignment and pretrial schedule at the anti-graft.

stories.title: Election voting advice from AI chatbots ‘inaccurate and unreliable’
stories.summary:
Election voting advice from AI chatbots ‘inaccurate and unreliable’.

Research during Hungary election shows AI recommended parties not running and gave highly volatile answers to identical prompts AI chatbots provide inaccurate, inconsistent and unreliable guidance to voters asking which party they should back, a study suggests, often recommending the wrong party, not mentioning the right one, or listing parties not even running.

“The results raise serious concerns about the reliability of general-purpose AI systems in electoral contexts,”<a href=".

stories.title: Not enough water for UK’s datacentre plans, trade body says
stories.summary:
Not enough water for UK’s datacentre plans, trade body says. Industry says government’s failure to address cooling demands means AI growth plans are ‘fatally flawed’ The UK will not have enough water for future datacentres, the water industry has said in stark criticism of the government’s AI growth plans.

Datacentres rely on large amounts of water to manage the heat generated by densely packed servers. Cooling towers, chillers and humidification systems make direct use of this water, with large volumes also consumed indirectly through high.

stories.title: Inside the horrifying online network where children extort others to commit violence and self-harm
stories.summary:
Inside the horrifying online network where children extort others to commit violence and self-harm. The 764 network is just one part of a growing online ecosystem that pushes young members into brutal and degrading acts.

It has perpetrators and victims in dozens of countries In late 2024, in a quiet suburb of Stockholm, a 14-year-old boy approached a man in his 80s who was using a walker.

He stabbed the man three times in the back. The video of the attack in Hässelby was streamed and spread quickly.

It fed a global online ecosystem that actively encourages and glorifies acts of.

stories.title: Bub – living an artist’s dreams and dreads in New York
stories.summary:
Bub – living an artist’s dreams and dreads in New York. An autobiographical game about the devastating effects of chronic illness on an artist’s creative life gives players the chance to slow the pace right down Bub does not look like a traditional video game.

Artist and stop-motion animator Case Jernigan spends hours, days, months in his studio drawing, painting and delicately cutting out pieces of collected paper, while coder and gameplay designer Todd Anderson builds scripts and physics simulations to make them into a game. <p.
